topics.label: Series & DataFrame
topics.description: Create from dicts, lists, CSV. Series is 1D, DataFrame is 2D tabular data.

topics.label: Reading Data
topics.description: read_csv, read_excel, read_json, read_sql. Import data from any source.

topics.label: Data Types & Missing Data
topics.description: dtypes, astype, isna, fillna, dropna. Handle missing values properly.

topics.label: Basic Operations
topics.description: describe, value_counts, sort_values, head, tail, info.

phases.label: Data Manipulation
phases.description: Transform, group, merge, and reshape data.

topics.label: GroupBy
topics.description: groupby with agg, transform, apply, filter. Split-apply-combine pattern.

topics.label: Merge & Join
topics.description: merge, join, concat for combining DataFrames. SQL-like joins.

topics.label: Pivot & Reshape
topics.description: pivot_table, melt, stack, unstack. Transform between wide and long formats.

topics.label: Apply & Vectorized Ops
topics.description: apply, map, applymap for custom transformations. Prefer vectorized operations.

topics.label: String & DateTime
topics.description: str accessor for text, dt accessor for dates. Parse, format, and compute.

topics.label: Export Data
topics.description: to_csv, to_excel, to_json, to_sql. Save processed data.
